{{Quote|I know that ship, Luke! It's a long-range ''Imperial hunter''!|[[Kam Solusar]], to Luke Skywalker after spotting the ''Scourge One''|<ref name="Dark Empire II 3">[[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]]</ref>}}
'''Imperial hunters''' were long-range intercept [[Starship/Legends|starships]] developed by the [[Dark Empire]] during the reign of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].

==History==
One such ship, ''[[Scourge One]]'', carried [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]], [[Vill Goir]], and a group of [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-enhanced [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to the ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], in an effort to capture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] for Palpatine.

Several Imperial Hunters would later return to the planet to capture [[Ysanna/Legends|Ysanna]] shamans for cloning experiments aimed at providing Palpatine with a better genetic stock.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]] {{1st}}
*[[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]]
